permissions.purpose: single Cloud Asset SearchAllResources call enumerates every supported and unsupported resource type
Bundle G1 (#470): read per-function IAM bindings to materialize google_cloudfunctions2_function_iam_member rows
Bundle G1 (#470): read per-cryptoKey IAM bindings to materialize google_kms_crypto_key_iam_binding rows
Bundle G1 (#470): read project-level IAM policy to materialize google_project_iam_member rows
Bundle G4 (#478): enumerate default-supported IDP configs to materialize google_identity_platform_default_supported_idp_config rows
Bundle G1 (#470): read per-service IAM bindings to materialize google_cloud_run_v2_service_iam_member rows
Bundle G1 (#470): read per-secret IAM bindings to materialize google_secret_manager_secret_iam_binding and _iam_member rows
Bundle G3 (#475): enumerate per-secret versions to materialize google_secret_manager_secret_version rows
Bundle G4 (#478): enumerate per-network peering connections to materialize google_service_networking_connection rows
Bundle G4 (#478): enumerate enabled project services to materialize google_project_service rows
Bundle G1 (#470): read per-bucket IAM bindings to materialize google_storage_bucket_iam_member rows
Bundle G3 (#475): enumerate per-bucket objects (capped at 1000/bucket) to materialize google_storage_bucket_object rows
Bundle G4 (#478): enumerate Serverless VPC Access connectors to materialize google_vpc_access_connector rows
